pr.title: ConfigurationSchemaGenerator: Fix typo and enable opt-out
pr.author: bart-vmware

failed_jobs.name: Tests / Run VS Code extension unit tests (Windows)
failed_jobs.reason: NPM package installation failed with HTTP 429 Too Many Requests from pkgs.dev.azure.com/dnceng npm registry during the 'Install dependencies' step. This is a transient rate-limiting issue on the internal npm feed.

failed_jobs.name: Tests / Hosting.Testing / Hosting.Testing (ubuntu-latest)
failed_jobs.reason: CrashTests(genericEntryPoint: True, crashArg: "after-build") failed with System.InvalidOperationException. The PR only modifies src/Components/Directory.Build.targets which is unrelated to Aspire.Hosting.Testing.Tests. The failure appears to be an intermittent issue with crash-handling test infrastructure.
